message:
fix(test): install-section test uses data-section scoping + tab panel assertion

The install section's role="tab" buttons are siblings of #install (a
heading), not children. Switch test locator from '#install [role="tab"]'
to 'section[data-section="install"] [role="tab"]'. Also verifies
aria-controls panel visibility after tab click.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
